158.reason: [This assumes there are always two more characters after the opening quote. If the file ends after '\'' or only one character follows, this will either miss an error or cause incorrect parsing (e.g., on single quote at EOF). Also, doesn't validate that exactly one character is between quotes.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This assumes there are always two more characters after the opening quote. If the file ends after '\'' or only one character follows, this will either miss an error or cause incorrect parsing (e.g., on single quote at EOF). reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character constant is unterminated (e.g., only a single quote or quote followed by EOF), accessing next may be invalid and i+=2 may skip beyond the input, causing incorrect parsing or missing error handling]
